zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervase d'Avenel於大約1140年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，他的父親Robert Avenel25歲，母親Sybil21歲。他和Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1219年在蘇格蘭度福利爾艾斯達爾 迪斯特利可特享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: d'Avenel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from Ravenel, the name of several places in various parts of France, e.g. in Oise, derived from Old French ravene (from Latin raphanus) ‘horseradish’.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Ravenelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gaetan, Normand, Raoul.
French: variant of   Ravenel   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: Christophe Ravenelle dit Lalime, a French soldier from Nancy, Lorraine, who married Agathe Charron in QC in 1758, was born Ravenel. Some of his descendants bear the surname Lalime .

variants.name: Ravenell
meanings: Possibly also a rare variant of English Ravenhill or its cognates Ravenhall or Revnell.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervase d'Avenel was born about 1140, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Avenel, was 25 and his mother, Sybil, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale. He died in 1219, in Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gervase d'Avenel est né environ 1140, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Avenel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sybil, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale. Il est décédé en 1219, à Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gervase d'Avenel um 1140 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Avenel 25 und seine Mutter Sybil 21. Er hatte mit Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1219 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Gervase d'Avenelが約1140年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで生まれた時，父Robert Avenelは25歳，母Sybilは21歳であった。彼はSybilla Gervase of Eskdaleとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1219年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアエスクダル ディストリクトで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 랭홀름
ko.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Gervase d'Avenel(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Avenel(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 스k데일 디스트릭트에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gervase d'Avenel nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Avenel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sybil, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale. Ele faleceu em 1219, em Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervase d'Avenel родился около 1140 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Avenel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Sybilla Gervase of Eskdale. Он умер в 1219 г. в местности эскдеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
